title: おとろしないで、おいなりさん

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out together, Tamamo Cross and I
wander the area by the academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Psst, psst! C'mon, there's nothin' to be scared of!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There ya go. Who's a good girl? Sorry to come
encroaching on your space, gorgeous...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yelp!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Ouuuch! You really latched on there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You in the middle of a one-person skit or
somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey guys! Good timin'. Take a peek down into
this ditch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We follow Inari One's gaze down into the crevice
to find...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, there's a fox in here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, poor gal's gotten herself tangled up in a
net.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
She's real antsy. Whenever I try to pull her out,
she bites me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's all muddied up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't got it in me to leave her in there... What
should we do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: First, let's try and calm her down.

Let's go down into the ditch and free her from
the net!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Good plan. How 'bout we feed her somethin'?
Seein' as we just went to the grocery store and all.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Somethin' a fox can eat... Somethin' a fox can
eat...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Here ya go, I got some tasty beans for ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, she's lookin' at 'em! They're not poisonous,
c'monnn, give 'em a nibble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fox cranes her neck out, but then, the very
moment she gobbles up the beans—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoosh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? She vanished into thin air!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute. There's somethin' there, right
where the fox was...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's a stopwatch! And it's pretty fancy-lookin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Is this her way of sayin' thanks? Ahaha, how cute!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wow, life sure can take ya by surprise
sometimes... Hey, Trainer. How 'bout we use this?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, guess we gotta, huh. But if there's one
thing I got, it's guts.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'm here to save your fluffy li'l tush, so
don't go squirmin' now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaping into the ditch, Tamamo Cross lifts the
net off. But the very moment she yanks it away—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A bright light envelops my vision...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What the?! Why's it so dark out?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tama, check it out... There's a gorgeous gal
standing right over there.
I thank you...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: W-we're back! What the heck just happened?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And what's up with that drink in your hand?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're right! How'd that get there?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Mm. Not bad.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You're actually drinkin' it?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Between this 'n the mysterious lady sayin' thanks,
I'll guess it's a token of the fox's appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Life sure can take ya by surprise...
